mapper.sql:
select be.building_name , ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ci.room_number , ci.qr_code_path , ci.classroom_info_id
FROM classroom_info ci left join building_enum be on ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 = be.building_enum_id
mapper.select:
select be.building_name , ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 , ci.room_number , ci.qr_code_path , ci.classroom_info_id
FROM classroom_info ci left join
building_enum
be on ci.building_enum_building_enum_id_1 = be.building_enum_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
